en: She's on her way. Tell everyone.
She's not supposed to be here until nine. Her driver just texted and her facialist ruptured a disc.
ko: 9시까지 안 올 예정이었는데, 운전기사한테 문자가 왔고 피부관리사가 디스크가 터졌대요.

en: God, these people. I can't even talk.
ko: 세상에, 이 사람들 정말. 말도 못 하겠어.

en: All right, everyone, gird your loins!
Would someone eat an onion bagel?
